intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How the TikTok Algorithm Works. TikTok recommends based on user interactions, video information, and device/account settings themes disclosed by the platform. Treat explanations as evolving models, not fixed formulas.
mainSummary: TikTok recommends based on user interactions, video information, and device/account settings themes disclosed by the platform. Treat explanations as evolving models, not fixed formulas.
